hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"[Context Manager Active] Apply context-manager skill discipline this session: (1) Lazy loading — only read files when about to act on them. (2) Grep before Read — find exact lines first, then read targeted ranges. (3) Subagent-first for research — delegate any search spanning 3+ files to Explore subagents. (4) Compact output — write to files instead of outputting large content to conversation. (5) Background delegation — run independent work streams in background subagents. (6) Monitor pressure — if conversation gets deep (15+ turns) or many files read (5+), recommend /compact. Say context check for a health diagnostic anytime."}}'
